description: Comprehensive Tempo distributed tracing deep-dive dashboard covering write path, query path, compaction, and resource utilization across multiple clusters and stacks.

panels.description: Total rate of spans received across all distributors. Indicates the overall ingestion volume of tracing data.
panels.title: Spans Received/s

panels.description: Ingestion quality of service — percentage of push requests completing within 0.5s SLO. Thresholds: red < 90%, yellow < 95%, green >= 99%.

targets.expr:
100 * (
  sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*push.*|.*v1/traces", le="0.5"}[$__rate_interval]))
  /
  sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*push.*|.*v1/traces", le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval]))
)

panels.title: Ingestion QoS

panels.description: Query quality of service — percentage of query requests completing within 2.0s SLO. Indicates query-path health and user experience.

targets.expr:
100 * (
  sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*traces.*|.*search.*|.*query.*", le="2.0"}[$__rate_interval]))
  /
  sum(rate(tempo_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", stack=~"$stack", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~".*traces.*|.*search.*|.*query.*", le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval]))
)

panels.title: Query QoS

panels.description: Rate of traces received per second. Each trace may contain multiple spans; this metric reflects trace-level throughput.
panels.title: Traces Received/s

panels.description: Number of tenants currently owned by compactors. Indicates compactor workload distribution.
panels.title: Compactor Tenants

panels.description: Total number of blocks in the blocklist across all tenants. Reflects backend storage volume.
panels.title: Blocks Total

panels.description: Rate of spans received per second broken down by cluster. Helps identify ingestion hotspots across clusters.
panels.title: Spans Received/s by Cluster

panels.description: Push latency percentiles (P50, P90, P99) for the distributor write path. High latency may indicate back-pressure from ingesters.
panels.title: Push Latency P50/P90/P99

panels.description: Rate of bytes received by the distributor broken down by cluster. Useful for capacity planning and identifying bandwidth-heavy clusters.
panels.title: Bytes Received/s

panels.description: Rate of spans discarded by the distributor, broken down by reason (e.g., rate limiting, trace too large). Non-zero values require investigation.
panels.title: Spans Refused/s

panels.description: Total number of live (in-memory) traces across all ingesters. High values may indicate flush lag or memory pressure.
panels.title: Live Traces

panels.description: Ingester flush latency percentiles (P50, P99). Flush latency affects how quickly data becomes queryable and impacts ingester memory.
panels.title: Ingester Flush Latency

panels.description: Rate at which ingesters flush completed blocks to backend storage. Steady rate indicates healthy ingester operation.
panels.title: Blocks Flushed/s

panels.description: Rate of bytes written by ingesters to backend storage. Correlates with flush activity and data volume.
panels.title: Bytes Written/s

panels.description: Query frontend requests per second broken down by HTTP status code. 5xx responses indicate server-side errors requiring investigation.
panels.title: Query Frontend — QPS by Status

panels.description: Query frontend latency percentiles (P50, P90, P99) for trace query and search routes. Indicates end-user query experience.
panels.title: Query Frontend — Latency P50/P90/P99

panels.description: Rate of traces inspected by the querier during query execution. High values may indicate inefficient queries or missing indexes.
panels.title: Querier — Traces Inspected/s

panels.description: Search duration percentiles (P50, P99). Reflects the time spent executing TraceQL and tag-based search queries.
panels.title: Search — Duration P50/P99

panels.description: Rate of compaction cycles completed. Steady compaction prevents block accumulation and keeps query performance optimal.
panels.title: Compaction Cycles/s

panels.description: Average number of blocks per tenant in the blocklist. Tenants with disproportionately many blocks may need compaction tuning.
panels.title: Blocks per Tenant

panels.description: Rate of object store operations broken down by operation type (get, put, delete, etc.). Helps identify backend I/O bottlenecks.
panels.title: Object Store Ops/s

panels.description: CPU usage by Tempo component (distributor, ingester, querier, compactor, query-frontend). Helps identify resource-constrained components.
panels.title: CPU by Component

panels.description: Working set memory by Tempo component. Approaching container limits may cause OOM kills and service disruption.
panels.title: Memory by Component

title: Tempo Deep Dive — Multi-Stack Operations
